title: Daemon-side crypto module (X25519 + PSK-HKDF + AES-256-GCM)
description: Extract encryption logic into daemon/src/extensions/cowork-crypto.ts. Implements: X25519 keypair generation, ECDH shared secret, PSK-authenticated HKDF-SHA256 key derivation, AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt with AAD, sequence counter management. All using node:crypto, zero dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: generateEphemeralKeyPair() returns X25519 public/private key pair
deriveSessionKey(sharedSecret, psk, extensionPubKey, daemonPubKey) returns 32-byte AES key using PSK-authenticated HKDF
HKDF info is sorted public keys joined by colon
encrypt(sessionKey, plaintext, seq) returns { payload, nonce } using AES-256-GCM with AAD 'cowork:<seq>'
decrypt(sessionKey, payload, nonce, seq) returns plaintext or throws on auth failure
Decrypt with wrong seq (AAD mismatch) throws
computeFingerprint(publicKey) returns first 16 hex chars of SHA-256
